NoteSet.Note: Sample implementation of PUS3 Housekeeping (HK and diagnostic parameter report structures).

Parameter.name: gen_props_entries
Parameter.shortDescription: Gen-props entries (struct_id + status + interval) for TM[3,35/36]

Parameter.name: pfrd_entries
Parameter.shortDescription: PFRD entries (nature + def_id + status + interval) for TM[3,41]

SequenceContainer.name: TM_3_35
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: TM[3,35] HK periodic generation properties report

SequenceContainer.name: TM_3_36
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: TM[3,36] diagnostic periodic generation properties report

MetaCommand.name: CREATE_HK_STRUCTURE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,1] create housekeeping parameter report structure

MetaCommand.name: CREATE_DIAG_STRUCTURE
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,2] create diagnostic parameter report structure

MetaCommand.name: DELETE_HK_STRUCTURES
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,3] delete housekeeping parameter report structures

MetaCommand.name: DELETE_DIAG_STRUCTURES
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,4] delete diagnostic parameter report structures

MetaCommand.name: ENABLE_HK_PERIODIC_GEN
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,5] enable periodic generation of HK parameter reports

MetaCommand.name: DISABLE_HK_PERIODIC_GEN
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,6] disable periodic generation of HK parameter reports

MetaCommand.name: ENABLE_DIAG_PERIODIC_GEN
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,7] enable periodic generation of diagnostic parameter reports

MetaCommand.name: DISABLE_DIAG_PERIODIC_GEN
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,8] disable periodic generation of diagnostic parameter reports

MetaCommand.name: REPORT_HK_STRUCTURES
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,9] report HK parameter report structures (response: TM[3,10])

MetaCommand.name: REPORT_DIAG_STRUCTURES
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,11] report diagnostic parameter report structures (response: TM[3,12])

MetaCommand.name: ONESHOT_HK
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,27] generate one-shot HK parameter report (response: TM[3,25])

MetaCommand.name: ONESHOT_DIAG
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,28] generate one-shot diagnostic parameter report (response: TM[3,26])

MetaCommand.name: APPEND_HK_PARAMS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,29] append parameters to a HK parameter report structure

MetaCommand.name: APPEND_DIAG_PARAMS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,30] append parameters to a diagnostic parameter report structure

MetaCommand.name: MODIFY_HK_INTERVAL
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,31] modify collection interval of HK parameter report structures

MetaCommand.name: MODIFY_DIAG_INTERVAL
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,32] modify collection interval of diagnostic parameter report structures

MetaCommand.name: REPORT_HK_GEN_PROPS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,33] report HK periodic generation properties (response: TM[3,35])

MetaCommand.name: REPORT_DIAG_GEN_PROPS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,34] report diagnostic periodic generation properties (response: TM[3,36])

MetaCommand.name: APPLY_PFRC
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,37] apply parameter functional reporting configurations

MetaCommand.name: CREATE_PFRD
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,38] create parameter functional reporting definition

MetaCommand.name: DELETE_PFRDS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,39] delete parameter functional reporting definitions

MetaCommand.name: REPORT_PFRDS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,40] report parameter functional reporting definitions (response: TM[3,41])

MetaCommand.name: ADD_PFRD_ENTRIES
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,42] add parameter report definitions to a PFRD

MetaCommand.name: REMOVE_PFRD_ENTRIES
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,43] remove parameter report definitions from a PFRD

MetaCommand.name: MODIFY_PFRD_GEN_PROPS
MetaCommand.shortDescription: TC[3,44] modify periodic generation properties of report defs in a PFRD

Parameter.name: sr_simply_param_ids
Parameter.shortDescription: Simply-commuted parameter IDs in declaration order

Parameter.name: sc_param_ids
Parameter.shortDescription: Parameter IDs in one super-commuted set

SequenceContainer.name: TM_3_10
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: TM[3,10] HK parameter report structure report

SequenceContainer.name: TM_3_12
SequenceContainer.shortDescription: TM[3,12] diagnostic parameter report structure report
